paragraphs.text: A simple paragraph for testing MCQs and TFNG items with various answer marker formats.

question_area.text: Choose the correct letter, A, B, C or D.
1. MCQ with checkmark ✓ on correct option.
A) First distractor
B) Second option with ✓
C) Third distractor
D) Fourth distractor
Paragraph B: Second option is correct because... full explanation here for the test.

question_area.text: 2. MCQ with [correct] marker.
A) Wrong choice
B) Another wrong choice
C) Correct answer [correct]
D) Last wrong choice
3. TFNG inline [TRUE] in statement.
3. The passage states that the paragraph is simple. [TRUE]

question_area.text: 4. TFNG inline [FALSE] in statement.
4. The paragraph contains zero sentences. [FALSE]
5. TFNG inline [NOT GIVEN] in statement.

paragraphs.label: A
paragraphs.text: The study tracked sample groups and measured outcomes across five behavioral categories.

paragraphs.label: B
paragraphs.text: Researchers found that early intervention correlated with higher retention rates.

paragraphs.label: C
paragraphs.text: Follow-up surveys confirmed the pattern persisted over multiple years.

question_area.text: Complete the summary. Choose NO MORE THAN TWO WORDS.
The study used (10) ______ groups and measured (11) ______ across categories. Early (12) ______ correlated with higher retention. The pattern (13) ______ over multiple years.
Answers: (10) sample (11) outcomes (12) intervention (13) persisted
10. sample 11. outcomes 12. intervention 13. persisted
Which paragraph contains the following information? NB You may use any letter more than once.
14. A description of the groups used in the study A
Paragraph A: 'The study tracked sample groups'

runs.text: Paragraph A: 'The study tracked sample groups'

question_area.text: 15. A finding regarding early intervention B
Paragraph B: 'researchers found that early intervention'

runs.text: Paragraph B: 'researchers found that early intervention'

question_area.text: 16. Evidence that the pattern was not temporary C
Paragraph C: 'the pattern persisted over multiple years'

runs.text: Paragraph C: 'the pattern persisted over multiple years'

paragraphs.label: A
paragraphs.text: The first section introduces the core idea of structured observation.

paragraphs.label: B
paragraphs.text: The second part elaborates on the methodology used in the study.

paragraphs.label: C
paragraphs.text: The third section discusses potential limitations of the approach.

question_area.text: Choose the correct heading for each paragraph.
List of Headings
i. The initial framework for observation
ii. How the study was conducted
iii. Weaknesses in the observational design
iv. An unrelated example for distractor
v. A summary of key recommendations
1. Paragraph A i
Paragraph A: 'introduces the core idea of structured observation' — heading i.

runs.text: Paragraph A: 'introduces the core idea of structured observation' — heading i.

question_area.text: 2. Paragraph B ii
Paragraph B: 'methodology' — heading ii.
3. Paragraph C iii
Paragraph C: 'limitations' — heading iii.
Distractors: iv, v
